description: Mia Kelly is an award-winning singer-songwriter from Gatineau, Quebec, making her mark on the Canadian folk music scene with a distinctive blend of folk, rock, and blues. Since releasing her 2022 debut album, Garden Through The War, she has been recognized as a poetic lyricist with a powerful and versatile voice. Known for her ability to weave the stories of those around her into her music, Kelly is an imaginative storyteller who channels raw, vulnerable emotion through expertly crafted songs.
title: Mia Kelly Concert
